title: Architect of Fate
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: Across the war-torn galaxy, the Space Marines fight battles they believe are their own, never suspecting that they move as pieces in the schemes of a single, ancient manipulator. Kairos Fateweaver, the twin-headed greater daemon of Tzeentch, has spun a plan thousands of years in the making, and friend and foe alike unknowingly serve his design. This collection gathers four linked tales: a doomed ship haunted by what the warp left behind, a desperate recovery mission beneath a dying sky, the Imperial Fists' stand against a relentless Iron Warriors assault, and a final reckoning at the very edge of the Eye of Terror. Yet even the Architect of Fate cannot see what waits beyond the end of the age.

collects.basis: Architect of Fate (Space Marine Battles anthology #10, ed. Christian Dunn, 2012) collects exactly these four novellas; contents enumerated by Lexicanum and Black Library. OQ(14)(e) / Resolver-Pass 6.
